title: Speech Audio
description: WAV audio data containing human speech for transcription by Whisper or similar models
documentation:
## Purpose
Represents a WAV audio file whose primary content is human speech intended for automatic transcription. The semantic tag distinguishes it from general-purpose audio, allowing pipelines to route the file to speech-to-text services automatically.

## When to use
Use `media:audio;speech;wav` when producing or consuming WAV recordings that will be fed to a transcription model such as Whisper. Do not use the generic [WAV Audio](https://capdag.com/browse/media:wav;audio) type for this purpose, as it carries no transcription intent.

## Notes
The file must be a standard PCM WAV. Whisper and most transcription APIs expect mono or stereo 16-bit PCM at 16 kHz or higher. Callers should resample or convert before passing audio to a model if the source does not meet those requirements.
